info.title: Regis — NBFC Compliance Platform (Phase 1)
info.description: AI-assisted, human-confirmed compliance calendar for Indian NBFCs. Deterministic cores; read-only AI; ap-south-1 data residency.

get.description:
Resolve the bearer token to the current principal + the org's entities
(so the SPA can verify session validity and populate the entity selector).

post.description:
Public: an invited teammate activates their membership (sets a password if
they're a brand-new user) and receives a session token.

get.description: Active members eligible to own obligations (owner picker).

schema.title: Response Change Role Team Members  Membership Id  Role Patch
Response Remove Team Members  Membership Id  Remove Post

post.description:
Run extraction WITHOUT committing — feeds the review screen (PRD Step 4):
derived/extracted fields flagged, contradictions surfaced, gap questions ranked.
The human confirms before anything persists.

schema.title: Response Profile Preview Onboarding Profile Preview Post

post.description: Commit the confirmed profile, then generate + persist the calendar.

schema.title: Response Calendar Generate Onboarding Calendar Generate Post
Response List Instances Obligations Instances Get
Response Instance Detail Obligations Instances  Instance Id  Get

get.description: Risk-weighted counts for the action tiles + a simple health score.
